name: sigflare
description: Minimal TypeScript event collector that writes raw PV events to ClickHouse.

scripts.dev: pnpm run set-env:dev && pnpm dlx concurrently -k --names tracker-build,tracker-static,worker "vite build -c vite.tracker.config.ts --watch" "pnpm dlx http-server dist/tracker -p 8788 -c-1" "pnpm dlx wrangler dev src/index.ts --env-file .env"
scripts.build: pnpm run set-env:main && pnpm run build:raw
scripts.build:raw: vite build -c vite.config.ts && vite build -c vite.tracker.config.ts
scripts.deploy:prod: pnpm run set-env:main && pnpm run build:raw && node scripts/deploy-with-vars.mjs .env.main
scripts.deploy:prod:dry-run: pnpm run set-env:main && pnpm run build:raw && node scripts/deploy-with-vars.mjs .env.main --dry-run
